result:
My verifier work is committed in `ab9934cf88e`. The remaining uncommitted changes in `git status` are from other parallel agents working on unrelated operations:
- `tt_metal/third_party/tt_ops_code_gen` — submodule
- `ttnn/ttnn/operations/glu_fused/pipeline_logs/*` — different op
- `ttnn/ttnn/operations/backward_softmax/*` — different op
- `.eval/`, `tilelang_assessment.md` — unrelated artifacts

Per the hook instructions: "Stage ONLY files you created/modified (not files from parallel agents)" — I should not commit these. My verification of `atan_mean` is complete and committed.
